checks.name: project_verify
checks.command: python3 -c "import html.parser; html.parser.HTMLParser().feed(open('app.html').read())" && grep -q 'executeGAS' app.html && grep -q 'GAS_URL' app.html && echo 'VERIFY_PASSED'

checks.name: z_index_change_verify
checks.result: matched: <div id="activityStatusBar" data-state="idle" class="fixed left-0 right-0 bottom-0 z-[90] pointer-events-none bg-white/95 border-t border-slate-200">

checks.name: no_alert_confirm_prompt
checks.command: grep -c 'alert(' app.html && grep -c 'confirm(' app.html && grep -c 'prompt(' app.html
